# Read the Secondary Subcategory One Information of an App Info

**Web Service Endpoint**

Get the first App Store subcategory within an app’s secondary category.

## Reading Subcategories

- **Read the Primary Subcategory One Information of an App Info**: Get the first App Store subcategory within an app’s primary category.
- **Read the Primary Subcategory Two Information of an App Info**: Get the second App Store subcategory within an app’s primary category.
- **Read the Secondary Subcategory Two Information of an App Info**: Get the second App Store subcategory within an app’s secondary category.
- **GET /v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/primarySubcategoryOne**
- **GET /v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/primarySubcategoryTwo**
- **GET /v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/secondarySubcategoryOne**
- **GET /v1/appInfos/{id}/relationships/secondarySubcategoryTwo**
